rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level annexes in valid implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE expressions
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Insert annex blocks at the appropriate scope level
Preserve existing architecture when adding annexes
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE expressions
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Do not place assumptions or guarantees in invalid scopes
